fields.label: Contact Number
fields.description: 10-digit Indian phone, canonical form +91-XXXXXXXXXX. Mandatory at create-time (API-level enforcement); column is nullable so the existing 15 pre-S30 rows remain readable as NULL. PD-S29-LEAD-FORM-FIELDS.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.description: Validated at API boundary via frappe.utils.validate_email_address. Mandatory at create-time; column nullable for pre-S30 backward compat.

fields.label: Contact Person Name
fields.description: Name of the primary contact at the prospect organization. Optional at create-time; pre-fills the Convert-to-Inquiry modal's contact_person field. PD-S30-LEAD-CONTACT-FIELDS.

fields.label: Contact Person Designation
fields.description: Job title / role of the primary contact (e.g. 'Procurement Manager'). Optional. PD-S30-LEAD-CONTACT-FIELDS.

fields.label: Meeting Brief
fields.description: Short text summary of the initial contact. Mandatory at create-time; column nullable for pre-S30 backward compat.

fields.label: Closure Notes
fields.description: Operator notes captured at lead closure (Closed-Won/Closed-Lost). Set via close_lead API; read-only via portal once set. PD-S29-LEAD-INQUIRY-CLOSURE-UI.

fields.label: Next Follow-Up Date
fields.description: Date of the next scheduled follow-up touchpoint for this lead. Optional. Set/updated via portal via update_lead_followup API. Drives the 'Due today / this week / overdue' filter chips on /leads list. PD-S30-LEAD-FOLLOWUP Phase 1.

fields.label: Attachment 1
fields.description: First file attachment (PDF/PNG/JPG/JPEG/DOCX/XLSX, max 10MB). Optional. Storage: private/files/. PD-S30-LEAD-ATTACHMENTS.

fields.label: Attachment 2
fields.description: Second file attachment (PDF/PNG/JPG/JPEG/DOCX/XLSX, max 10MB). Optional. Storage: private/files/.

fields.label: Attachment 3
fields.description: Third file attachment (PDF/PNG/JPG/JPEG/DOCX/XLSX, max 10MB). Optional. Storage: private/files/.

fields.label: Creating Employee
fields.description: VECRM Employee who created this lead via the portal. Set automatically by vecrm.api.create_lead from session.data.vecrm_employee_phone. Schema substrate for PD-S28 per-rep scoping; do not edit directly.
